content: sues went through this. 13 PRs merged. Zero design rewrites. I persist all the research with corvia (github.com/chunzhe10/corvia). When I revisit a topic, I see what I explored before and what changed since. The knowledge compounds instead of evaporating. Layer 1 is where I learn. Layer 2 is where Claude excels. Skipping Layer 1 is how you end up rewriting things three times. Do you have a structured exploration phase, or do you jump straight to code? #AIAssistedDev #DevWorkflow #ClaudeCode #BuildInPublic #DesignFirst
